disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint names that are disabled. If the requested touchpoint is in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of subtouchpoint names that are disabled. If the requested subtouchpoint is in this list, the offer screen will not open (returns CAN_NOT_OPEN state).

touchpoints.description: Array of touchpoint configurations, each defining offer display rules for one or more touchpoints in the app. When a touchpoint is requested, the system finds a matching entry by 'name' or 'names', falling back to the 'default' touchpoint if no specific match is found.

names.description: Alternative list of touchpoint names that this entry responds to. A touchpoint matches if the requested name equals 'name' OR is contained in this 'names' list.

name.description: Primary touchpoint identifier. Matched against the requested touchpoint name. A touchpoint named 'default' serves as a fallback when no specific touchpoint matches.

info.description: Array of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines a complete offer with its screens, session tracking, launch conditions, and display settings. Entries are evaluated in order; the first one whose launch_logic conditions pass is used.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after a successful subscription purchase from this offer.

launch_logic.description: Array of launch logic rules defining the conditions under which this offer can be shown. Each rule is a set of conditions (session counts, install days, storage, subscription state, etc.) that are all ANDed together. Multiple rules in the array are evaluated in order; if any single rule passes all its conditions, the offer is eligible to be shown.

should_replace_with_ad.description: If true, this offer entry is replaced with an interstitial ad. The offer is skipped if the interstitial ad cannot be shown for the current touchpoint. Defaults to false.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: If true, this offer entry is replaced with a rewarded credit ad flow. The offer is skipped if the rewarded credit ad is not available for the current touchpoint. Defaults to false.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this check.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum editor-done action count (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this check.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) means no upper bound; the offer shows for all sessions at or above app_session_start.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum editor-done action count (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) means no upper bound.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum offer session count (inclusive) for this touchpoint+screens combination. Tracks how many times this specific offer has been shown. A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this check.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers. If non-empty, the offer is shown only if the user's purchase history includes a subscription for at least one of these packages.

user_had_subscription.description: Filters the offer based on whether the user has ever had any subscription. If true, only users with subscription history see the offer. If false, only users who never had a subscription see the offer. If omitted (null), no subscription history filtering is applied.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: If true, this offer entry is replaced with a reward interstitial ad. The offer is skipped if the reward interstitial ad cannot be shown for the current touchpoint. Defaults to false.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. The key session count is tracked per session_key. A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this check.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app installation (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) means no upper bound.

is_ai_credit.description: Filters the offer based on whether the user is currently in an AI credit flow. If true, only users in the AI credit flow see the offer. If false, only users not in the AI credit flow see the offer. If omitted (null), no AI credit filtering is applied.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Offer screen touchpoint identifier within this launch logic rule. Takes priority over the legacy 'offer_screen_touch_point' field.

repeat_key_session.description: If set, the offer is shown only on specific key session intervals. The check uses (key_session_count + 1) % (repeat_key_session + 1) == 0. A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this repeating filter.

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum device storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this check.

is_store_available.description: Controls whether the offer requires the Google Play Store to be an active payment method. If true (default), the offer is shown only when the Play Store is available. If false, the offer is shown only when the Play Store is not available.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key session count (exclusive) for showing the offer. The key session count is tracked per session_key. A value of -1 (or omitted) means no upper bound.

repeat_session.description: If set, the offer is shown only when the app session count is evenly divisible by this value (app_session_count % repeat_session == 0). A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this repeating filter.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field for the offer screen touchpoint identifier within this launch logic rule. Superseded by 'offer_screen_touchpoint'; used as fallback when 'offer_screen_touchpoint' is not provided.

restricted_packages.description: List of restricted package/offer pairs. If non-empty, the user must be eligible for all specified promotional offers (checked via isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer) for this launch logic rule to pass.

package_id.description: Subscription package identifier used to check the user's eligibility for a promotional offer.

offer_id.description: Promotional offer identifier used together with package_id to check the user's eligibility.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type strings the user must currently be on. If non-empty, the offer is shown only when the user's current subscription tier matches one of these values. The value 'free' matches non-subscribed users. If empty or omitted, no tier filtering is applied.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) disables this check. Compared against the total number of app sessions the user has had.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times the offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint+screens combination. A value of -1 (or omitted) means no daily limit.

should_replace_with_reward.description: If true, this offer entry is replaced with a rewarded ad flow. The offer is skipped if the rewarded ad is not available for the current touchpoint. Defaults to false.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: If true, the offer is skipped when the user is within a one-day pass cooldown period (cooldown period has not passed). If false or omitted, the cooldown check is not applied.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum offer session count (exclusive) for this touchpoint+screens combination. A value of -1 (or omitted) means no upper bound.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum device storage usage percentage (exclusive) for showing the offer. A value of -1 (or omitted) means no upper bound.

offer_variant.description: Offer variant identifier string used to distinguish between different visual or behavioral variants of the same offer screen.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer. Used together with the touchpoint name to build a composite key for session and daily limit tracking (format: 'touchpoint.screen1.screen2').

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Offer screen touchpoint identifier. Takes priority over the legacy 'offer_screen_touch_point' field. Identifies which offer screen variant to display.

session_key.description: Key used for tracking per-offer key session counts. When non-empty, the key session count is incremented each time the offer is shown and checked against key_session_start/key_session_end and repeat_key_session in launch_logic.

is_one_time_offer.description: If true, this offer represents a one-time purchase (non-recurring) rather than a subscription offer.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy field for the offer screen touchpoint identifier. Superseded by 'offer_screen_touchpoint'; used as fallback when 'offer_screen_touchpoint' is not provided.
